title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Pune University International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Pune University International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Pune University International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pune University International Enterprises:
Pune University International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
